title: Cassie is still waiting for her forever home
description: GEORGE NEWS - Cassie is a sweet,...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Cassie is a sweet, one-year-old girl currently being cared for at the Garden Route SPCA. She came to them unwanted, emaciated, and heartbroken, but with good food and plenty of love, her sparkle has returned.


> Cassie now greets her carers with the cutest happy dance and a wagging tail that never stops! She's full of life, adores people, and gets along wonderfully with other dogs. She’s ready to give her heart to a loving family. Could that be you?


Visit Cassie at the Garden Route SPCA, 1 Mission Road, George Industrial, or call 044 878 1990Your new best friend might be waiting!

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
